mapper.select:
select s.id as id,
count(skr.keyword_id) as match_keywords,
0 as match_keywords,
s.score as score from tb_shop s
left join tb_shop_keyword_relation skr on s.id = skr.shop_id
where s.category_id = #{categoryId} and s.status = #{status} and s.id in
#{shopId}
and keyword_id in
#{kid}
group by s.id

select s.id, s.shop_name, sc.id as category_id, sc.category_name, s.address, s.longitude, s.latitude, s.score, s.phone, s.image_url, s.status, s.create_time, s.update_time from tb_shop s left join tb_shop_category sc on s.category_id = sc.id where s.id in
#{shopId}
